title: Quadlet unsupported key 'Pull'
body:
### Issue Description

Placing a Quadlet file in `/etc/containers/systemd/$NAME.container` with a `Pull=always` key under `[Container]` generates the following notice in journald:

```
Jul 08 10:13:13 localhost quadlet-generator[1702]: Error converting '$NAME.container', ignoring: unsupported key 'Pull' in group 'Container' in /etc/containers/systemd/$NAME.container
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

See above.

### Describe the results you received

See above.

### Describe the results you expected

The `Pull` key should be supported, https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#pull

comments.body:
Hi @vilgotf , 
The support for the Pull key was added [here](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/6611735aeb30ad7617ca527804f6137309793297) which was after 4.5.1 was released. Therefore, it will be supported only as part of the upcoming 4.6.0
I see now that I was on the "latest" version of the docs instead of "stable". My bad!
